svg.title: Sliding window trace over array [4, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3] tracking max length l
svg.desc: Six snapshots of a sliding-window scan over the array 4, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3, read top row left to right then bottom row right to left. Pointers L and R bound the current window shown in red, elements outside the window once passed are marked with a red X, and l tracks the maximum window length found so far, ending at l = 3 for the run of three 3s.
svg.text: * l represents the maximum length so far
